# Parse HTML
**ID:** parseHtml  
**Type:** Atomic  
**Level:** II  
**Rarity:** Common  
**Status:** Provisional

---

## Description
Extracts structured content from raw HTML, navigating DOM trees and handling malformed markup.

_None._
